title: No enabled payment gateway - order cannot be placed
expected: A customer can choose a payment method and place an order (MVP acceptance)
actual: Order summary shows "Sorry, it seems that there are no available payment methods." wp-cli confirms bacs/cheque/cod all disabled
steps_to_reproduce: Add any product to cart > go to /checkout/ > observe payment area

title: No shipping zones/methods configured
expected: Customer can pick a delivery method (Standard/Express/Local Pickup) and see shipping cost
actual: Shipping & Handling shows "-"; only the default catch-all zone exists with no methods
steps_to_reproduce: Go to /checkout/ with item in cart > observe Shipping & Handling row

title: Price does not reflect configured quantity/options
expected: Choosing Print Quantity 500 (or options) should change the price
actual: Total stays flat at $19.99 regardless of Print Quantity=500 or any option; line item shows the specs but price is a fixed "starting price"
steps_to_reproduce: Configure product with Print Quantity 500 > Add to Cart > view cart total

title: Checkout header text overlap
expected: Heading and intro text should not overlap
actual: "2. Enter Your Address" overlaps the intro line "...delivery address, and payment to place the order."
steps_to_reproduce: Open /checkout/ with item in cart > look at the heading area

title: Contact form is non-functional
expected: Submitting the contact form should send/store the message and show confirmation
actual: Form (contact_name/email/subject/message) has action="#" and no nonce/handler; submit does nothing
steps_to_reproduce: Open /contact/ > fill the message form > submit

title: No editable quantity control in cart
expected: Customer should be able to change line-item quantity
actual: No qty input/stepper present; an ""Update cart"" button exists but nothing to update
steps_to_reproduce: Add item to cart > open /cart/ > try to change quantity

title: No coupon field on cart page
expected: Coupons are a required feature and are typically applied on the cart
actual: Cart page has no coupon input (coupon field IS available on /checkout/)
steps_to_reproduce: Open /cart/ > look for a coupon code field

title: Footer Privacy Policy links to WP default boilerplate
expected: Footer should link to the branded /privacy/ template page
actual: Footer "Privacy Policy" -> /privacy-policy/ (default WordPress boilerplate, 5.5k chars) instead of the custom /privacy/ template
steps_to_reproduce: Scroll to footer > click Privacy Policy

title: No visible registration option on My Account
expected: New customers should be able to register from the account page
actual: My Account shows only a Sign-in form; registration form exists only in the header Account dropdown
steps_to_reproduce: Open /my-account/ logged out > look for a Create Account option

title: Artwork File column empty in list view
expected: Staff should be able to download/preview the uploaded file from the list
actual: File column shows "-" in the Artwork Files list (download may only exist on edit screen - needs confirm)
steps_to_reproduce: Log in as admin > Artwork Files > view File column

title: Product cards/gallery use gray placeholder images
expected: Product cards should be image-led and scannable
actual: Product listing cards and product gallery show small gray placeholder blocks rather than product images

title: No on-page add-to-cart confirmation
expected: Adding to cart should show a visible confirmation
actual: Only the header "Cart (n)" count updates; no toast/inline notice on the product page (cart page does show a notice)
steps_to_reproduce: Configure product > Add to Cart > observe page

title: Browser tab title is just ""Pixel""
expected: Title should be branded e.g. ""Pixel Signs & Printing""
actual: Home document title is ""Pixel""

title: Footer social links are placeholders
expected: Social icons should point to real profiles (or be hidden)
actual: Footer LinkedIn/Instagram/Facebook all link to /contact/ while the header announcement bar links to real social domains - inconsistent

title: Duplicate/orphan and default pages present
expected: One canonical page per policy; no WP demo pages
actual: Orphan duplicates: /terms/ vs /terms-conditions/, /shipping-policy/ vs /shipping-delivery-policy/, /privacy/ vs /privacy-policy/; "Sample Page" published; "Refund and Returns Policy" draft

title: Double-encoded ampersand in page title
expected: Title should read ""Shipping & Delivery""
actual: Title stored as ""Shipping & Delivery"" (double-encoded)

title: Footer newsletter input has no name attribute
expected: Newsletter email field should submit a named value
actual: Footer ""Email address"" input has empty name attribute

title: jQuery Migrate loaded in production
expected: Production should not load jquery-migrate
actual: Console logs ""JQMIGRATE: Migrate is installed"" on front-end pages

title: Starter/placeholder legal copy
expected: Real reviewed legal copy before launch
actual: About/Contact/legal pages use starter placeholder content (rendered via templates)

title: Packaging category card has no real filter
expected: Packaging card should link to a packaging category filter
actual: Packaging card links to /products/ (no ?category=) - known follow-up

title: Order number required for all uploads
expected: First-time uploads (no order yet) should not be blocked by a required order number
actual: pixel_order_number is required even when the user has no order
steps_to_reproduce: Open /upload-artwork/ > try to submit without an order number

title: Order label inconsistency
expected: Order identifier should be consistent
actual: Portal shows ""#ORD-59"" while order tracking shows ""Order #59""

title: True phone-width testing not possible in headed browser
expected: Render at 390 and 360 CSS px
actual: Headed Chrome min window width clamps viewport to ~585px; could not render below it. Tested at 585px (clean, no overflow). Prior Abdullah Playwright run validated 375px

title: Payment success/failed and invoice screens not reachable
expected: Reach order-received/invoice after placing an order
actual: Blocked by PX-001 (no payment gateway) - cannot complete an order through the UI

title: Wishlist feature not located
expected: Wishlist is a listed requirement
actual: No wishlist UI found in nav/account during crawl - presence unconfirmed
